preparations: Unona chrysea is a plant species native to tropical Africa, and its herbal preparations are primarily used in traditional medicine. The roots and bark of the plant are typically harvested and dried to be used in various remedies. Traditional herbalists have reported using Unona chrysea to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
